ops.note: promotion.watcher_promotable(result, comparison) applies the card rule via instrument.paired_verdict: actionable iff 95% CI excludes 0 AND |delta| >= mde(se_delta_paired) (=2.8016*SE at measured rho); actionable regression refuses, within-noise is never win/loss/rejection (supersedes athome's point-AUC fold); unpaired fallback = instrument.unpaired_verdict with card frame MDE (sweep.compare_score_reports reads INSTRUMENT_CARD sidecar keys mde/stopping/mde_paired). Golden: E27 fixture -> "actionable regression (delta -0.0254, 95% CI [-0.0372, -0.0136], rho 0.8647, paired MDE 0.0168)"; E28 fixture -> "within noise floor (MDE 0.0237)" reproducing delong_report.json to 1e-9 (mde rel 1e-4).
